problem: opencode sandbox auto-rejects external_directory access (/tmp) — it exited 0 WITHOUT delivering test-pack-roundtrip.mjs. Two lessons: (1) sub-agent briefs for opencode must keep all work inside the repo tree (use a repo-internal temp dir, cleaned in finally); (2) a sub-agent exit 0 is a claim, not verification — orchestrator must check the deliverable exists before recording (caught here because the file was absent).
